A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], '''Dav-Wes Renno''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], which plagued the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during its final decades, the former Jedi [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] reemerged as a political idealist for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Renno and [[Chief Librarian/Legends|Chief Librarian]] [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]] assisted the journalist [[Harris Sanseon]] compile data for the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] Special Feature entitled ''[[Who is Count Dooku?]]''.<ref name="HNN54" />

== Behind the Scenes ==
Dav-Wes Renno's name is a [[Tuckerization]] of archaeologist and writer [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]], author of several ''Star Wars'' reference books.
